summary: Completed full backend + frontend testing for Legal Document Preparer site. All 8 backend pytest tests passed (health, blog seeding, blog detail, 404, consultation create/list, validation, contact create). Frontend home, services list, service detail (Deeds), about, blog list (4 cards), blog post, contact page, contact form submission and consultation form submission all work end-to-end. Mobile menu toggle opens drawer correctly (verified via screenshot). RESEND_API_KEY is empty as expected; backend correctly returns email_sent=False without erroring; data still persists in MongoDB.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI on_event startup/shutdown hooks; consider migrating to lifespan context for future-proofing.

_build_consultation_admin_html interpolates user-supplied fields (first_name, message, etc.) directly into HTML without escaping. If RESEND is enabled later, this is an XSS-in-email risk. Recommend html.escape on all interpolated values.
CORS_ORIGINS='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec; browsers will reject credentialed requests. Either set allow_credentials=False or restrict origins to specific domains.

Frontend mobile menu uses different data-testids than the desktop nav (nav-services etc. were not present in mobile drawer). For automation, mirroring the same data-testids in both layouts would be more consistent.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed consultation and contact records via API; created TEST_E2E consultation via UI. Blog posts (4) were auto-seeded by backend on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py and can be rerun with `pytest backend/tests/test_backend_api.py -v`. Mobile menu uses its own data-testids (Sheet-based drawer), distinct from desktop nav. Calendar popover uses shadcn DayPicker; for UI scripts, click [data-testid=open-date-picker] then click a day cell (e.g. role=gridcell with day number), not role=button. Consultation form accepts submission without date/time (those are optional). Contact form success toast says 'Message sent. We'll be in touch soon.' (do not check for 'Thank you').
rca of the issue: No bugs found. RESEND email_sent=False is expected behavior because RESEND_API_KEY is intentionally empty in .env (user hasn't supplied yet). Backend logs a warning and still persists to MongoDB. Frontend flows all functional.
